titleStmt.title: SII 38.482: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 482. (A.R. No. 482 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north wall, Gaṇēśa shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakkaravartti Rājarājadēva (III) Year: 2, Dhanus, ba. di. 11 Monday, Anusham, 1218 A.D. Other details are irregular.

summary.p: Records a gift of 3000 kāśu deposited in the temple treasury by Umaiyāṇḍāḷ Sāṉi, the wife of Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ Bhāṭṭaṉ, a resident of Aṅgarāyaragaram in Tuṇḍattūr in Puṟaṅgarambai-nāḍu, in order to burn a perpetual lamp to the god Tiruttuṟai-nāyanār. The lamp was to be burnt out of the interest accrued on the amount deposited.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti
kaḷ śrī�ca�catevarkkuRead as rācarācatevarkku. The second ca in this word is engraved below this line.yāṇṭu 2 ḷu
taṉunāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣa
ttu EkādecayumRead ekādaciyumtiṅkaḷkiḻa
maiyum peṟṟa Aṉiṣattunāḷ puṟaṅ
karampaināṭṭu tuṇṭattūril
Aṅkarāyar Akarattu tirumaṅkalat
tu tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭaṉ
pirā(mu)maṇi Umaiyāṇṭāḷcāṉi U
ṭaiyār taruttuṟaināyaṉārkkuRead as tiruttuṟaināyaṉārkkuvai
tta tirunantāviḷakku Onṟukku śrīpaṇṭāra
ttu Oṭukkiṉa kācu 3000 Ikkācu muvāyira
mum mutalniṟkka policaikku cantirā
tittavarai Eriya vaitta tiruviḷak
ku Oṉṟu .
Digital edition of SII 38.482 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
